case.title: PEOPLE OF STATE OF NEW YORK EX REL FEDERAL MOTOR TRUCK

opinion.h4: PEOPLE OF STATE OF NEW YORK EX REL FEDERAL MOTOR TRUCK, (1935)
opinion.h2: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF NEW YORK, ex rel. FEDERAL MOTOR TRUCK CO., OF NEW YORK, Inc., petitioner, v. Thomas M. LYNCH et al., as and Constituting the State Tax Commission of New York.* No. 131.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Howard A. Sperry, of New York City, for petitioner.
For decision below, see 264 N.Y. 679, 191 N.E. 623.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of the State of New York denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 662, 56 S. Ct. 167.[ People of State of New York ex rel Federal Motor Truck (1935) ]
